name: nightshift-marketplace
description: Local marketplace hosting the Nightshift autonomous build orchestrator.

plugins.name: nightshift
plugins.description: Interview -> SPEC -> PRD -> GitHub issues -> autonomous multi-day build with Fable-5 orchestration, Cursor + Codex executors, self-verification, loop guards and destructive-op protection. Includes daily issue triage: builds 'ai-ready' issues on their own branch and opens reviewed PRs.
